nasb.text: Vindicate me, O Lord, for I have walked in my integrity, And I have trusted in the Lord without wavering.

esv.text: Vindicate me, O Lord, for I have walked in my integrity, and I have trusted in the Lord without wavering.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！求你為我伸冤， 因為我向來行事正直； 我倚靠耶和華，並不動搖。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，求你为我申冤， 因为我行为纯全， 毫不动摇地信靠你。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，求你为我伸冤！ 因为我行在纯全中； 我依靠耶和华，必不动摇。
